name: suno-fastapi-app-root
description: Self-hosted FastAPI and React workspace for local-first SunoAPI.org music production.

scripts.install:react: rm -f frontend-react/package-lock.json && rm -rf frontend-react/node_modules/.vite frontend-react/.vite && npm --prefix frontend-react install
scripts.restart: npm run stop && npm run start
scripts.react:install: rm -f frontend-react/package-lock.json && rm -rf frontend-react/node_modules/.vite frontend-react/.vite && npm --prefix frontend-react install
